title: GCB Lite block.fields.json
description:
Schema for block.fields.json — the sibling of block.json that declares Inspector controls. The plugin auto-generates WP block attributes from these controls.

Per-control config keys are generated from schemas/controls/{type}.md via tools/build-schema.mjs — do not hand-edit the `allOf` branches under $defs.control.

controls.description: Inspector controls. Each non-structural control becomes a block attribute.

allowed_blocks.description: Block names allowed inside this block's <InnerBlocks/>. `null` = allow all.

id.description: Unique within the block. Used to wire `parentPanelId` references.

type.description: Control type. `group` / `panel` / `tools-panel` are structural (render Inspector panel headers, produce no attribute). `repeater` is a special marker that maps to inner-blocks rather than an Inspector field. All other types map to an Inspector field with a typed attribute.

attributeKey.description: Required for non-group controls. Becomes the WP block attribute name.

options.description: Choices for select / radio. Each is `{label, value}`.

parentPanelId.description: Nests this control under a `group`-type control with this `id`.

validation.description: Author-side validation rules. Enforced client- and server-side.

conditionalLogic.description: Show this control only when another control matches a value. Shape: { field, operator, value }.

default.description: Pre-selected values. Empty array if omitted.
Pre-selected values. Empty array if omitted.
Pre-selected values. Empty array if omitted.

rows.description: Height of the textarea, in rows.

placeholder.description: Greyed-out hint shown when the input is empty.

helpText.description: One-line description shown below the input.

showGradients.description: Show the gradient picker tab. When false (default) the popover is color-only.

gradientAttributeKey.description: Optional. If set, the gradient value is stored in this attribute instead of the same one as the color. Useful when your render.php / React component expects color and gradient as separate props.

helpText.description: One-line description shown below the picker.
One-line description shown below the picker.

placeholder.description: Greyed-out hint shown when the input is empty.

helpText.description: One-line description shown below the input.

allowedTypes.description: MIME top-level types to allow in the media library picker (e.g. `["application", "text"]` for PDFs and docs).

helpText.description: One-line description shown above the gallery.
One-line description shown below the control.

default.description: Initial value. Both keys are optional; missing pieces fall back to empty string / first item of `levels`.

levels.description: Subset of `h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, div, span` the author can choose. Default is all six h-levels.

default.description: Initial value. Both keys are optional; missing pieces fall back to empty string / first item of `levels`.

levels.description: Subset of `h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, div, span` the author can choose. Default is all six h-levels.

namespace.description: Restrict the picker to icons whose name starts with `${namespace}/`. Forward-compat with WP 7.1''s `register_block_icon` API.

filter.description: Explicit allow-list of full icon names. Takes precedence over `namespace`. Use for hand-curated subsets per block.

enableFocalPoint.description: Show the FocalPointPicker so the author can choose a focus point for cover-cropping.

enableSizeOptions.description: Show cover / contain / tile + custom-width selectors.

message.description: The body text shown in the message panel. Preferred over `helpText`.

helpText.description: Fallback body text when `message` is not set.

label.description: Optional heading shown above the message panel.

variant.description: Visual treatment of the panel. Defaults to "neutral" (grey). Use `warning` (amber) for "be careful," `danger` (red) for "this won't work," `success` (green) for "looks good," `info` (blue) for tips.

step.description: Increment for the spinner / arrow keys.

placeholder.description: Greyed-out hint shown when the input is empty.

helpText.description: One-line description shown below the input.

postType.description: Optional. Lock the field to one (or comma-separated multiple) post type slugs. When omitted, the editor user picks via a dropdown at edit time. Stored value always carries the chosen post type alongside the IDs.

multiple.description: Allow selecting more than one. With `true` the saved ids array can have multiple entries; with `false` it has exactly one.

default.description: Pre-selected value. Should match one of the option `value`s.

map.description: Legacy form. Key/value pairs that produce labelled tick marks. Stored value is the token, not the key.

tokenGroup.description: Bind to a theme.json token group (e.g. `"spacing"`). The slider snaps between tokens and stores the full token object.

defaultOptionKey.description: When `map` or `tokenGroup` is set, the key to use as default if the saved value is empty.

postType.description: WP post type slug(s) to search.

returnFormat.description: `"id"` (default) stores post IDs; `"object"` stores full post objects.

enablePostTypeFilter.description: Show a post-type dropdown in the picker (when multiple types are allowed).

enableTaxonomyFilter.description: Show taxonomy term dropdowns in the picker.

allowedblocks.description: JSON-stringified array of allowed child block names. Set on the marker tag, not in `block.fields.json`.

addbuttonlabel.description: Label for the Add button. Set on the marker tag.

template.description: Optional. JSON of initial child blocks to seed the repeater with. Set on the marker tag.

headingLevels.description: Which heading levels appear in the block-type select.

allowImages.description: Show the insert-image toolbar button. Set to `false` for caption-style fields.

display.description: Force a specific display mode. Default behaviour: `popover` in sidebar variants, `inline` on wide surfaces.

placeholder.description: Greyed-out hint shown on the collapsed button in popover/modal mode.

map.description: Legacy form. Key/value pairs mapping option keys to richer values.

tokenGroup.description: Bind to a theme.json token group (e.g. `"color"`, `"font-size"`). Stored value becomes the full token object.

tokenKeys.description: When `tokenGroup` is set, restrict to these token keys only.

defaultOptionKey.description: Initial value if the field is empty.

placeholder.description: Label for the auto-prepended empty option.

helpText.description: One-line description shown below the input.

presets.default: [{ value: "none", label: "None" }, { value: "small", label: "S" }, { value: "medium", label: "M" }, { value: "large", label: "L" }]

taxonomy.description: Optional. Lock the field to one taxonomy slug. When omitted, the editor user picks via a dropdown at edit time. Stored value always carries the chosen taxonomy alongside the IDs.

restBase.description: Optional override for the REST base of a taxonomy with a non-standard rest_base. Only needed when register_taxonomy() set a custom rest_base.

multiple.description: Allow more than one term. `false` stores a single-element ids array.

allowCreateTerms.description: Show a "Create new term" form in the picker popover.

default.description: Initial value if the author hasn't edited the field.

placeholder.description: Greyed-out hint shown when the input is empty.

helpText.description: One-line description shown below the input.

validation.required.description: Block save until the field is filled in.

validation.maxLength.description: Maximum character count. Shown as "X / Y" counter in the editor.

validation.pattern.description: Regex the value must match. Enforced client- and server-side.

default.description: Initial value if the author hasn't edited the field.

placeholder.description: Greyed-out hint shown when the input is empty.

helpText.description: One-line description shown below the input.

validation.required.description: Block save until the field is filled in.

validation.maxLength.description: Maximum character count. Shown as "X / Y" counter in the editor.

validation.pattern.description: Regex the value must match. Enforced client- and server-side.

options.description: `toggle-group` only. The choices shown as segments. Required for `toggle-group`.

default.description: For `toggle` a boolean; for `toggle-group` the pre-selected `value` (should match one of the options or no segment will be active).

options.description: `toggle-group` only. The choices shown as segments. Required for `toggle-group`.

default.description: For `toggle` a boolean; for `toggle-group` the pre-selected `value` (should match one of the options or no segment will be active).

multiple.description: Allow selecting more than one user.

returnFormat.description: `"id"` (default) or `"object"`. With `"object"` the saved value is `{ id, name }`.

headingLevels.description: Which heading levels appear in the block-type select.
